data.title: Bitcoin Exchange Bithumb Announces It Will List This Altcoin on Its Spot Trading Platform! Here Are the Details
data.description:
South Korea-based cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb has announced it will make its Lighter (LIT) asset available for trading on the Korean won (KRW) market. Continue Reading: Bitcoin Exchange Bithumb Announces It Will List This Altcoin on Its Spot Trading Platform! Here Are the Details
source: https://en.bitcoinsistemi.com/bitcoin-exchange-bithumb-announces-it-will-list-this-altcoin-on-its-spot-trading-platform-here-are-t-4/

data.title: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has granted a virtual asset trading platform operating license to VDX, a subsidiary of Victory Digital.
data.description: The Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has updated its official website to show that it has issued a virtual asset trading platform operating license to VDX, a digital asset trading platform under Victory Fintech Company Limited. The company is authorized to conduct Type 1 (dealing in securities) and Type 7 (providing automated trading services) regulated activities. At the same time, its subsidiary VDX Custody Limited has also been licensed under the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance to provide digital asset custody services. As of now, the number of licensed virtual asset trading platforms in Hong Kong has reached 12.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | UK Prime Minister Considers Significant Increase in Defense Spending
data.description: UK Prime Minister is contemplating a substantial rise in defense expenditure, according to BBC reports. According to Jin10, Downing Street is evaluating the possibility of advancing current spending targets, which could cost billions of pounds. At the Munich Security Conference, Prime Minister Starmer expressed his stance, stating, "To address broader threats, it is clear we need to invest more funds and accelerate the pace of investment." Last year, the Prime Minister pledged to raise core defense spending to 2.5% of GDP by April 2027. However, he also proposed an "ambitious" plan to increase this spending ratio to 3% of GDP within the next parliamentary term. BBC has learned that the Prime Minister's aides are studying related proposals to achieve the 3% defense spending target before the end of the current parliamentary term, which may last until 2029.

data.title: AI Chatbots and Housing Market Stability Discussed in London
data.description: AI chatbots and the stability of house prices are key topics in London today. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the focus on these issues as the city prepares for the day's activities. The discussion around AI chatbots centers on their growing influence and potential impact on various sectors. Meanwhile, the housing market remains stable, with prices showing little fluctuation. These topics are expected to shape conversations and decisions in the coming hours.

data.title: STOCKS | UK FTSE 100 Index Sees Mixed Opening Across Sectors
data.description: The UK FTSE 100 Index opened with varied performances across its sectors. According to Jin10, the financial sector experienced a 1.2% increase at the opening, while the technology sector saw a rise of 0.7%. In contrast, the utilities sector faced a decline, opening 0.9% lower. These movements reflect the ongoing shifts in market sentiment and sector-specific dynamics within the UK stock market.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Trader Faces Losses Amid Gold Price Drop
data.description:
On February 16, a report from Coinbob highlighted that 'Hyperliquid early contributor Loracle' established a PAXG (on-chain gold) long position before February 4. According to BlockBeats, following the drop in spot gold prices below $5,000 per ounce today, Loracle's position has shifted from profit to loss. The current average holding price is $5,047, with a position size of approximately $7.86 million, resulting in an unrealized loss of $60,000 (-3.8%).

In addition to PAXG, the address holds a significant long position in HYPE, with plans to purchase around 20,000 HYPE tokens at approximately $28 each to slightly increase the long position. Recently, Loracle has also been increasing their ZEC long position, which now totals $8.5 million.

Currently, Loracle is the largest long holder of HYPE, PAXG, and ZEC on the Hyperliquid platform, with a total account holding size of $63.2 million and an overall unrealized profit of $6.7 million.

Loracle, whose real name is Laurent Zeimes, is active in the Hyperliquid ecosystem and is considered one of its early contributors. He is the founder of Hypurrfun and has been actively participating in the Hyperliquid contract market.

data.title: New Year Celebrations Encouraged for All
data.description: Analyst @ai_9684xtpa posted on X, encouraging everyone to take a break from their usual activities to celebrate the New Year with family. Regardless of whether one is a U.S. stock trader, a P officer, an E guard, or a gold miner, the message is to put down phones and step away from computers to spend quality time with loved ones. The analyst also expressed gratitude to @okxchinese, @Mercy_okx, and @Haiteng_okx for providing a New Year greeting video, highlighting the usefulness of AI in creating such content.

data.title: Ethereum treasury company Republic Technologies announces $3 million private funding round
data.description: Republic Technologies, a Canadian-listed Ethereum treasury company, announced a private placement of up to 14,087,000 special warrants at $0.21 each, raising a total of $3 million. The company previously disclosed holdings of approximately 1,570.6 ETH at an average purchase price of $2,700, currently valued at approximately $3.2 million. (Businesswire)

data.title: Bank of America Highlights European Focus Amid Dollar Instability
data.description: Bank of America has expressed concerns about the current instability of the U.S. dollar. According to Jin10, while global attention is often on regions and countries reducing reliance on dollar-denominated assets, the focus should be on Europe. The bank notes that the new wave of structural dollar sell-offs should concentrate on Europe, where holdings are primarily in stocks with low hedge ratios. Currently, stock fund flows do not indicate a large-scale withdrawal. However, over time, incremental funds are likely to move towards non-U.S. markets, facing higher hedge ratio risks.

data.title: Malaysia's King Monitors Anti-Corruption Commission Amid Public Outcry
data.description:
Malaysia's king has issued a warning that the country's anti-corruption commission is under scrutiny following a series of reports by Bloomberg posted on X. These reports have led to significant public concern and debate over the agency's operations.

The king's statement highlights the growing attention on the commission's activities, as citizens demand greater transparency and accountability from government institutions. The reports have intensified discussions about the effectiveness and integrity of the anti-corruption efforts in Malaysia.

This development comes amid broader calls for reform within various government agencies, as the public seeks assurances that corruption is being effectively addressed. The king's remarks underscore the importance of maintaining public trust in the nation's anti-corruption measures.

data.title: Japan's Bond Market Sees Diverging Yields
data.description: Japan's bond market experienced a shift as yields on super-long bonds increased, while shorter-term rates declined. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this divergence in the bond market. The movement in yields reflects varying investor sentiment and economic expectations, with longer-term bonds reacting differently compared to their shorter-term counterparts. This trend is significant for investors and policymakers monitoring Japan's economic landscape.

data.title: Tokenized U.S. Treasuries Still Lead, But Equities Are Catching Up
data.description:
The real-world asset (RWA) market continues to be dominated by tokenized U. S. Treasuries, yet new data shows that equities are emerging as the fastest-growing segment within the sector. The shift suggests that 2026 may mark a broader expansion of on-chain financial products beyond yield-focused instruments
source: https://www.ethnews.com/tokenized-u-s-treasuries-still-lead-but-equities-are-catching-up/

data.title: US Dollar Maintains Dominance in Global Trade Despite De-Dollarization Talks
data.description: The US dollar continues to hold a dominant position in global trade, accounting for 50.5% of international transactions through the SWIFT network. According to NS3.AI, this represents an increase of 11.6 percentage points over the past four years, significantly outpacing other currencies like the euro and the Chinese yuan. Despite the emergence of alternative currencies and parallel systems, the entrenched role of the US dollar in international finance remains strong and challenging to displace swiftly.

data.title: Terrahaptix Secures $22 Million in Latest Funding Round
data.description: Terrahaptix has successfully raised an additional $22 million in its latest capital round. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's continued efforts to expand its operations and enhance its technological capabilities. This funding round is expected to support Terrahaptix in scaling its business and exploring new market opportunities. The company aims to leverage this financial boost to strengthen its position in the industry and drive innovation in its product offerings. The latest investment reflects growing confidence in Terrahaptix's potential for growth and development.

data.title: Binance adds RLUSD on XRPL as stablecoin hits $1.5B cap
data.description:
RLUSD market cap hit $1. 5 billion in February 2026 after Binance added XRPL support. Trading volume surged to $200 million following the integration announcement.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/binance-adds-rlusd-xrpl-stablecoin-hits-1-5b-cap

data.title: Animoca Brands wins Dubai crypto license to expand services in Middle East
data.description:
Dubai’s regulator approved the license on Feb. 5, allowing Animoca Brands to target institutional and qualified investors under the oversight of Dubai’s VARA.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/animoca-brands-dubai-vara-vasp-license-middle-east?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Hong Kong Gold Exchange Announces Closing Prices
data.description: The Hong Kong Gold Exchange has released the closing prices for last Friday, the 13th. According to Ming Pao, the price for 99 gold was 46,425 HKD, while the kilogram gold bar was priced at 1,252.3 HKD.

data.title: Bithumb will list Lighter (LIT) and open trading pairs for the Korean Won.
data.description: Bithumb announced that it will list Lighter (LIT) on the Korean Won market. Trading is expected to begin at 7:00 PM on February 16, 2026.
